title: eragrostis cilianensis var. subbiloba
intro: Eragrostis cilianensis var. subbiloba is a type of grass, commonly known as red fescue or meadow fescue. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use in treating digestive issues and its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis cilianensis var. subbiloba include its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. Eragrostis cilianensis var. subbiloba can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried for use in infusions, although the specific preparations may vary depending on the intended use and local traditions.
